hooks.prompt: At the start of this session, silently scan the current project for VAMFI context. Check: (1) Does a .claude/vamfi.local.md file exist? If so, load it and brief the user on the active engagement context. (2) Does a docs/vamfi/ directory exist? If so, list any existing artifacts (proposals, PRDs, architecture docs, runbooks) so the user knows what has already been produced. (3) Does CLAUDE.md contain project context relevant to a consultancy engagement? If so, extract the tech stack, goals, and constraints. Summarise findings in 3-5 bullet points prefixed with 'VAMFI Context:'. If no context is found, quietly offer to run /vamfi-software-consultancy:qualify to start a new engagement.

At the end of this session, check if any VAMFI consultancy artifacts were produced (proposals, PRDs, HLDs, architecture decisions, test strategies, runbooks, delivery plans, postmortems, etc.). If artifacts were produced: (1) Summarise what was created in bullet points. (2) Ask the user: 'Would you like me to save these artifacts to docs/vamfi/ in this project? I can create timestamped markdown files for each one.' If the user confirms, create the docs/vamfi/ directory if it does not exist and write each artifact as a separate markdown file with a filename pattern of: docs/vamfi/YYYY-MM-DD-artifact-type.md. Include an artifact registry entry at docs/vamfi/REGISTRY.md listing all artifacts with dates and brief descriptions.
